pub(crate) struct JoinHandle {
    output: Option<T>,
}
impl JoinHandle<T> {
    fn poll_join(&mut self, cx: &mut Context<'_>) -> Poll<Result<T, JoinError>> {
        cx.waker();
        match self.output.take() {
            Some(value) => {
                Poll::Ready(Ok(value))
            }
            None => {
                Poll::Pending
            }
        }
    }
}
